positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical arrangement of bioluminescent crescent moons, floating geometric constellations, and stylized celestial flora (night-blooming jasmine, star-dusted ferns). The design should feature clean, thick outlines and negative space contrast, rendered in a rich, deep indigo and glowing cyan palette, accented by metallic gold foil details. The composition must be centered and suitable for screen printing on dark fabric, featuring bold, uninterrupted silhouettes against a subtle, starry void background. Vector illustration style, high contrast, deep depth of field, minimalist yet maximalist.
negative: blurry, realistic photo, bad anatomy, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, messy, clutter, poor contrast, low saturation, multiple backgrounds, gradients, excessive gradients
